name: Anthropic
description: Anthropic model provider for Claude chat and reasoning models.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to Anthropic services

ANTHROPIC_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
ANTHROPIC_SMALL_MODEL.help: Override the default Anthropic small model identifier used by the plugin

ANTHROPIC_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
ANTHROPIC_LARGE_MODEL.help: Override the default Anthropic large model identifier used by the plugin

ANTHROPIC_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Experimental Telemetry
ANTHROPIC_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

ANTHROPIC_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Browser Base Url
ANTHROPIC_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for Anthropic requests (no secrets in the client).
